evals.prompt: 我有一个 Node.js 后端项目，代码写了挺久了但是没有任何知识库文档。帮我初始化一个知识库，把这个项目里值得沉淀的东西整理出来。项目在 /tmp/eval-legacy-node。
evals.expected_output: 探索仓库结构，识别关键模块，向用户提问业务语义和设计决策，然后在 knowledge/ 目录下创建针对具体问题域的 .md 文件，创建 AGENTS.md，并用软链创建 CLAUDE.md。不应该把代码实现细节抄进文档里。

assertions.description: AGENTS.md is created at the project root
CLAUDE.md exists and is a symlink pointing to AGENTS.md
knowledge/ directory is created with at least one .md file
Knowledge doc filenames describe problem domains (e.g. order-lifecycle.md), not code modules (e.g. service-a.md)
Knowledge docs do not copy implementation details (no function bodies, SQL, or call sequences)
AGENTS.md contains a table or links pointing to knowledge docs
The 'only webhook sets PAID status' constraint is captured somewhere in the knowledge base

evals.prompt: 这是个 monorepo，有 packages/api 和 packages/web 两个 package。我想先初始化根目录的知识库，再初始化 api 这个 package 的知识库。项目在 /tmp/eval-monorepo。
evals.expected_output: 检测到 monorepo 结构，分别为根目录和 packages/api 各创建 AGENTS.md + knowledge/ 目录。根目录 AGENTS.md 包含跨包关系和导航，api 的 AGENTS.md 只聚焦该包。两处都创建 CLAUDE.md 软链。

assertions.description: AGENTS.md is created at the monorepo root
Root CLAUDE.md is a symlink to AGENTS.md
packages/api/AGENTS.md is created
packages/api/CLAUDE.md is a symlink to packages/api/AGENTS.md
Root AGENTS.md references or links to per-package AGENTS.md files
packages/api/knowledge/ is created with at least one doc
Root AGENTS.md covers cross-package concerns; api AGENTS.md focuses on api-specific content (they don't duplicate each other)

evals.prompt:
我刚改了订单状态机的逻辑，新增了一个 REFUND_PENDING 状态，同时调整了 CANCELLED 状态的流转规则。帮我更新知识库。git diff 如下：

```diff
--- a/src/order/state-machine.ts
+++ b/src/order/state-machine.ts
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ export enum OrderStatus {
   PAID = 'PAID',
   SHIPPED = 'SHIPPED',
   DELIVERED = 'DELIVERED',
+  REFUND_PENDING = 'REFUND_PENDING',
   CANCELLED = 'CANCELLED',
 }
 
@@ -31,7 +32,9 @@ export const transitions: Record<OrderStatus, OrderStatus[]> = {
   [OrderStatus.DELIVERED]: [OrderStatus.CANCELLED],
-  [OrderStatus.CANCELLED]: [],
+  [OrderStatus.CANCELLED]: [OrderStatus.REFUND_PENDING],
+  [OrderStatus.REFUND_PENDING]: [OrderStatus.CANCELLED],
 };
```

项目知识库在 knowledge/，已有 order-lifecycle.md。
evals.expected_output: 分析 diff，识别 order-lifecycle.md 需要更新，询问用户关于 REFUND_PENDING 状态的业务语义（触发条件、谁发起、超时怎么处理等），然后更新该文档。不应自行推断业务含义。

assertions.description: knowledge/order-lifecycle.md was modified (not left unchanged)
REFUND_PENDING state appears in the updated doc
Both CANCELLED→REFUND_PENDING and REFUND_PENDING→CANCELLED transitions are documented
Doc notes that CANCELLED is no longer a terminal state (this is a breaking change in the mental model)
Doc does NOT invent specific business semantics for REFUND_PENDING (e.g. '30-day window', 'triggered by customer') without a TODO marker indicating it needs confirmation
Unclear business semantics are marked as TODO or question, not silently assumed
